title: Information Disclosure - phpinfo() Exposed
proof: GET /phpinfo.php returns full PHP configuration including: Server API (Apache 2.0 Handler), System (Linux 5.15.167.4), PHP Version, Configuration File Path (/etc/php/7.0/apache2/php.ini), database credentials, and all environment variables. Full disclosure of server internals with no access control.
poc_steps: Full PHP configuration visible including environment variables and DB credentials
